The device is not intended to be there

User is preventing proper device operation
Unable to process an execute command at this time

Potential fraud attempt detected
Not supported
high, full, inoperative or manipulated condition
No items can be accepted
state cannot be determined
The items have been in customer access.
It is not known if the items have been in customer access.
Due to a hardware error or other condition, the state of the intermediate stacker cannot be determined.
The physical device has no intermediate stacker.
Items have been in customer access
transaction ended with a rollback

The cash unit is full

Unavailable

The cash unit has been inserted
N0
N1
N2
Cash unit is full.
Recognition of the items took place, but one or more of the items are invalid.
There are no items in the input area.
A deposit has failed for a reason not covered by the other reasons and the failure is not a fatal hardware problem.
Failure of a common input component which is shared by all cash units.
The intermediate stacker is full.
Foreign items have been detected in the input position.
Recognition of the items did not take place. The bunch of notes inserted is invalid, e.g. it is too large or was inserted incorrectly.
One or more counterfeit items have been detected and refused.
Number of items count exceeded the limitation set with the. WFS_CMD_CIM_SET_CASH_IN_LIMIT command.
Amount exceeded the limitation set with the. WFS_CMD_CIM_SET_CASH_IN_LIMIT command.
The cash units can be emptied, replenished, removed or replaced.
The cash units to be returned to their normal physical state.
Double notes have been detected.
A long note has been detected.
A skewed note has been detected.
An item counting error has occurred.
Notes have been detected as being too close.
An item error not covered by the other values has been detected.
A short note has been detected.
The specified currency is not currently available
The teller ID is invalid.
A problem occurred with a cash unit. A WFS_EXEE_CIM_CASHUNITERROR event will be sent with the details.
There were too many items inserted previously. The cash-in stacker is full at the beginning of this command.
The position specified is not supported.
The safe door is open. This device requires the safe door to be closed in order to perform a WFS_CMD_CIM_CASH_IN_START command.
Shutter failed to open.
Shutter was already open.
Shutter was already closed.
Invalid cash unit.
There were no items to cash-in.
The CIM is in an exchange state.
There is no exchange active.
Shutter failed to close. In the case of explicit shutter control the application should close the shutter first.
Items were present at the output position at the start of the operation, but were removed before the operation was complete - some or all of the items were not retracted.
The CIM is already in the cash-in state due to a previous WFS_CMD_CIM_CASH_IN_START command.
There is no cash-in transaction active.
The output position is not empty so a cash-in is not possible.
The usIndex is not supported.
The retract area specified in usRetractArea is not supported.
An attempt to set a guidance light to a new value was invalid because the guidance light does not exist.
Foreign items have been detected inside the input position.

The load failed because the device is in a state that will not allow the configuration data to be loaded at this time, for example on some devices there may be notes present in the cash units when they should not be.
The hardware requires that the cash unit is empty before allowing changes.
At least one of the reference signatures is invalid. The application should prompt the operator to carefully retry the creation of the reference signatures.
At least one of the transaction signatures is invalid.
The power saving mode has not been activated because the device is not able to resume from the power saving mode within the specified usMaxPowerSaveRecoveryTime value.
The power saving mode has not been activated because media is present inside the device.
The device and/or the cash units specified could not be locked/unlocked. (e.g. the lock action could not be performed because the cash unit specified to be locked had been removed).
There were too many items. The required internal position may have been of insufficient size. All items should be returned to the cash unit from which they originated
A required internal position is not empty so a cash unit count is not possible.
An item processing transaction is active
The command specified in the dwCommand field is not supported by the Service Provider.
The preparation for the command specified in the dwCommand with the parameter specified in the lpCmdData is not supported by the Service Provider.
